lighting.shadow_character: Deep, high-contrast shadows of a hand and leaves used as a graphic element

color.grading_style: Clean & Vivid style with crushed blacks and selective color boosting

composition.composition_rule: Central framing with strong diagonal composition

texture.detail_rendering: Smooth texture of the food is well-rendered despite the hard light

improvement_notes: To enhance texture, add a faint fill light using a reflector. For a more subdued mood, slightly desaturate the background and apply an 'Orange and Teal' grade. For a classic composition, shift the subject off-center following the rule of thirds and use softer shadows.
nano_banana_prompt: Minimalist food photography of [a single piece of mango mochi] on a simple white ceramic plate, top-down flat lay angle. The scene is set against a vibrant, saturated orange background. Lit by hard, direct sunlight from the top-right, creating long, sharp, high-contrast shadows of a human hand and tropical leaves that fall across the plate and background. The style is graphic, modern, and clean. Shot on Kodak Ektar 100, ultra-detailed, sharp focus, deep depth of field.
